message:
fix(safety): add width saturation to GraphemeId

Prevent silent data corruption when width > 127:
- Add GraphemeId::MAX_WIDTH constant (127)
- Saturate width in GraphemeId::new() to prevent truncation
- Add explicit saturation in GraphemePool::alloc()
- Add test for width saturation behavior

Closes bd-3uep

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
